ops.text: PHASE 4 DONE (B1 render v2 + A4 eval-v2 freeze; cc-steer commits 0f35712/e002047/6cbf878 pushed): root cause of the attractor found by eval-v2 pass — 176/637 v1 eval rows (149 QA/21 review_comment/4 plan_review) reached the drafter as ONE EMPTY assistant turn (capture put the ask inside the label-bearing user trigger). Fix: rendering.ask_block = single structural formatter; structural_asks() rewrites AskUserQuestion previews (clip-tolerant, both repr quote styles, salvages clip-cut partial questions); watcher_prompt(render_version=1|2) versioned via watcher registry metadata -> CascadeConfig. export: watcher view += source_kind/session_id; positives get structural context + payload-derived ask block for QA rows whose window never carried it (question/header/recommended_pick ONLY - pick never joins prompt, test-guarded); negatives render v2. cc-transcript floor raised >=10,<11 (stale <10; code tracked 10.x sibling); CI clones the sibling (fixes the red run on cd272da). Re-exported: watcher test 641 rows -> raw fragments 0, empty prompts 27 (payload-less plan/review only, was 176), ask blocks 448; gate view code path untouched. Lab: WatcherRow += source_kind/session_id (v1 loads default ''); dataset/frozen_v2 frozen (641 rows, digest in freeze_v2 cell; eval-v1 verified bit-identical) + stratified judged subset 50 corrective/50 direction (results/eval_v2/judged_subset.json). Gates: cc-steer 319 tests + Linux docker ty; lab 220 tests + ruff + ty. NEXT: E8 trains on the v2 view; adapter registers with render_version 2.
